chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1403 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.5615/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 30-4-2025 Mr. J.K Jarwar, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, A.A.G Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG along with SIP Imtiaz Ali.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements have been filed by respondents No.2, 4, 5, 6 which are taken on record. The instant petition has been filed in respect of quashment of FIRs bearing Crime No.07/2024 and Crime No.19/2024, both registered with Police Station Fatehpur, District Larkana. This Court lacks jurisdiction to entertain the matter. The Investigating Officers of both FIR’s are present and filed statement which shows that in both FIR’s the challan has been submitted before the concerned Magistrate. Under the circumstances, the petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the trial Court for premature acquittal. Consequently, the instant petition, along with the listed application, is hereby dismissed leaving the petitioners at liberty to file application under Section 249-A or 265-K Cr.P.C, as the case may be before the trial Court. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
